title: Servium
description: A pack that improves server performance and stability without altering vanilla behavior.
body:
# Servium
Unlike paper and other plugin based server softwares, Servium tries to not alter ANY vanilla behavior, meaning redstone, farms and more shoud behave accordingly. Serverium only tries to improve performance and stability.

### What it adds
Servium improves chunk generation speed by a lot, with its better core managment and  effeciency. It also improves memory managment, tick times and more. It overall improves server performance and stability.

Not only that it also adds some quality of life mods like WorldEdit and Chunky.
### Things you need to know
While it can improve chunk generation by a lot possibly even more than two times, to make a big difference like that it might need some more ram, we recommend 6gb and more.
### Chunk generation (tested with 6gb):
- **Without Servium:**
  Processed 1089 chunks (100.00%), Total time: 0:00:12
- **With Servium:**
  Processed 1089 chunks (100.00%), Total time: 0:00:06
